mapper.select: SELECT id, brand, model, chipset, cpu_interface, memory_slots, max_memory, memory_type, power_phase, sata_ports, m2_slots, release_date, create_time, update_time FROM motherboard_info

SELECT id, brand, model, chipset, cpu_interface, memory_slots, max_memory, memory_type, power_phase, sata_ports, m2_slots, release_date, create_time, update_time FROM motherboard_info WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, brand, model, chipset, cpu_interface, memory_slots, max_memory, memory_type, power_phase, sata_ports, m2_slots, release_date, create_time, update_time FROM motherboard_info WHERE model = #{model}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO motherboard_info (brand, model, chipset, cpu_interface, memory_slots, max_memory, memory_type, power_phase, sata_ports, m2_slots, release_date, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{brand}, #{model}, #{chipset}, #{cpuInterface}, #{memorySlots}, #{maxMemory}, #{memoryType}, #{powerPhase}, #{sataPorts}, #{m2Slots}, #{releaseDate}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE motherboard_info SET brand = #{brand}, model = #{model}, chipset = #{chipset}, cpu_interface = #{cpuInterface}, memory_slots = #{memorySlots}, max_memory = #{maxMemory}, memory_type = #{memoryType}, power_phase = #{powerPhase}, sata_ports = #{sataPorts}, m2_slots = #{m2Slots}, release_date = #{releaseDate}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, brand, model, chipset, cpu_interface, memory_slots, max_memory, memory_type, power_phase, sata_ports, m2_slots, release_date, create_time, update_time FROM motherboard_info WHERE LOWER(brand) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{term}), '%') OR LOWER(model) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{term}), '%')
